Product navigation should not appear.
Home Docs Pricing Login

Provider Spine

The provider spine gives Grimoire a deterministic way to capture source text before any model reads it. It starts with routes that can return original markdown, then falls back to a small local HTML extraction path only when a verbatim source is not available.

The implementation preserves article paragraphs, code examples, and links while dropping navigation, scripts, styles, and repeated chrome. This fixture is intentionally verbose so the extractor crosses the shell detection threshold and is treated as a legitimate extracted capture.

Example

const capture = await fetchSource(url);
if (capture.fidelity === 'failed') {
  throw new Error('No usable source text');
}

When the extractor succeeds, the result is still not the same as a raw markdown route. It has gone through deterministic conversion and therefore receives extract fidelity rather than full fidelity. That distinction is the core behavior this fixture protects.

Additional body text keeps the fixture over five hundred characters. The conversion should produce readable markdown-ish output with headings, paragraphs, a fenced code block, and a markdown link to the reference page.

Footer should not appear.
